evals.prompt: Review a copied skill that still contains another repo's package manager, feature paths, and tool names. Adapt it so it follows this repository's Agent Skills conventions without preserving stale source-project details.
evals.expected_output: A revised skill or review plan that preserves the useful workflow while replacing foreign repo assumptions with this repo's real conventions.
assertions: The result keeps one clear skill responsibility
The result removes stale source-project commands, paths, and stack assumptions
The result uses relative same-skill support paths and repo-root-relative cross-skill paths
The result records any adapted source guidance when traceability matters

evals.prompt: Create a quality review plan for an important workflow skill, including trigger checks, output evals, grading, and how to use scripts without depending on a single client.
evals.expected_output: A provider-agnostic evaluation plan with realistic prompts, baseline comparison, evidence-backed grading, and script promotion guidance.
assertions: The plan tests both trigger quality and execution quality
The plan includes should-trigger and should-not-trigger near misses
The plan compares with-skill output to a baseline or previous version
The plan uses deterministic scripts for mechanical checks and human review for holistic quality
The plan avoids Claude-only CLI or viewer assumptions unless explicitly scoped to Claude
